content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the planner-reference cleanup commit. Changes correctly remove the planner field from CompletionPanelResolution, remove planner as a primary target in panel probe availability checks (diagnostics.rs), update the conformance probe-failure scenario to use an explicit disabled member instead of planner inheritance, rename and update tests, and clean stale planner references from docs. All modified tests pass (7/7), clippy is clean (-D warnings), and fmt --check passes. The remaining BackendPolicyRole::Planner and BackendRole::Planner variants are legitimately used for stage role resolution (plan_and_implement, planning, etc.) and are not stale final-review artifacts. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
